error_signature: users are redirected as if they lack the roles
title: Role-based redirection not recognizing Supabase roles
symptom: Users with the correct roles in Supabase are redirected as if they lack access. This occurs even when the app is published.
not_this_if: Users have access when role restrictions are removed
root_cause: The WeWeb application may not be properly capturing the roles assigned to users from Supabase, which can occur if the Row Level Security (RLS) policies in Supabase are not configured to allow authenticated users to read from the relevant tables.
fix_steps: Check the user variable from the auth plugin to see if roles are being captured.
If roles are not visible, update the RLS policies in Supabase to allow authenticated users to read from the userRoles and Roles tables.
agent_instruction: Verify the roles in the user variable and adjust RLS policies in Supabase if necessary.
